items.example: We have a maths exam next Monday.
All students must wear a school uniform.
Children start primary school at the age of five.
In the UK, secondary school is from age 11 to 16.
She wants to study law at university.
He graduated from Oxford University last year.
You need a good qualification to get this job.
She has a degree in economics.
All students must attend at least 80% of classes.
The teacher checks our progress every month.
The autumn term starts in September.
